center.name: 潘泰萊里亞
center.summary: 潘泰萊里亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括African blue tit，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northern Africa, Pantelleria (Italy) and the Canary Islands (Spain)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in northern Africa, Pantelleria (Italy) and the Canary Islands (Spain)
